name: agent_bare_model_dropped
input:
---
name: architect
description: Software architect
model: opus
tools: Read, Edit, Bash
---
Body text here.
expectedOutput:
---
name: architect
description: Software architect
permission: {read: allow, edit: allow, bash: allow}
mode: subagent
th-origin: opencode
---
Body text here.
note: model-less: opencode agents emit NO model: line so the harness follows the operator's /model pick on any provider. A bare CC alias in the input is dropped, not resolved.

name: agent_prefixed_model_dropped
input:
---
name: architect
model: anthropic/claude-opus-4-8
tools: Read
---
Body.
expectedOutput:
---
name: architect
permission: {read: allow}
mode: subagent
th-origin: opencode
---
Body.
note: model-less: even an already-provider-prefixed input model is dropped — opencode agents carry no model line.

name: agent_multi_tools
input:
---
description: Implementer
model: sonnet
tools: Read, Edit, Write, Bash, Glob
---
expectedOutput:
---
description: Implementer
permission: {read: allow, edit: allow, bash: allow, glob: allow}
mode: subagent
th-origin: opencode
---
note: Write collapses into edit; dedup means only one edit key.

name: agent_empty_tools
input:
---
name: init
model: haiku
tools: 
---
Body.
expectedOutput:
---
name: init
permission: {}
mode: subagent
th-origin: opencode
---
Body.
note: Empty tools list → empty permission object.

name: agent_effort_dropped
input:
---
name: lider
model: opus
effort: xhigh
tools: Read
---
Body.
expectedOutput:
---
name: lider
permission: {read: allow}
mode: subagent
th-origin: opencode
---
Body.
note: S-4: effort is dropped — opencode has no effort field. This case asserts the drop so a future reader does not restore it.

---
Body.

note: MCP tools are dropped from permission — opencode governs MCP separately.

name: agent_write_collapses_to_edit
input:
---
name: test
model: sonnet
tools: Read, Edit, Write, Glob, Grep
---
Body.
expectedOutput:
---
name: test
permission: {read: allow, edit: allow, glob: allow, grep: allow}
mode: subagent
th-origin: opencode
---
Body.
note: Write maps to edit; dedup → single edit key.

name: agent_blanket_mode_subagent
input:
---
name: lider
model: opus
tools: Read
---
Body.
expectedOutput:
---
name: lider
permission: {read: allow}
mode: subagent
th-origin: opencode
---
Body.
note: Generic transform injects mode: subagent for ALL agents — including lider. The mode-by-role override (lider → primary) is an installer layer applied AFTER this generic transform and is NOT reflected here (AC-12).

name: agent_all_mapped_tools
input:
---
name: implementer
model: sonnet
tools: Read, Edit, Write, Bash, Glob, Grep, Task, WebFetch, WebSearch, NotebookEdit
---
Body.
expectedOutput:
---
name: implementer
permission: {read: allow, edit: allow, bash: allow, glob: allow, grep: allow, task: allow, webfetch: allow, websearch: allow}
mode: subagent
th-origin: opencode
---
Body.
note: All 10 CC tool names mapped; Write+NotebookEdit collapse into edit (dedup).

description: A command
permission: {allow: [Read, Edit, Bash], ask: [], deny: []}
th-origin: opencode
---
Body.

---
Body.
expectedOutput:

name: deploy
description: Deploy command
permission: {allow: [Read, Bash], ask: [], deny: []}
th-origin: opencode
---
Body.

name: reject_inline_injection_in_body
input:
---
name: bad
model: sonnet
tools: Read
---
Some text !`evil` more text.
note: SEC-DR-4: inline bang-backtick injection in body is rejected fail-closed.

name: reject_fenced_injection_in_body
input:
---
name: bad
model: sonnet
tools: Read
---
```!evil
```
note: SEC-DR-4: fenced triple-backtick-bang injection in body is rejected fail-closed.

name: reject_injection_in_toplevel_string_value
input:
---
name: bad
description: Run !`evil` here
model: sonnet
tools: Read
---
Body.
note: SEC-DR-4: injection in a top-level frontmatter string value is rejected.

name: reject_injection_in_nested_object_value
input:
---
name: bad
model: sonnet
tools: Read
permission: {allow: [!`evil`]}
---
Body.
note: SEC-DR-4: injection in a nested object value (recursive check) is rejected.

name: reject_pollution_key_proto_toplevel
input:
---
name: bad
__proto__: {isAdmin: true}
model: sonnet
tools: Read
---
Body.
note: SEC-DR-4: __proto__ at top level is rejected.

name: reject_pollution_key_constructor_toplevel
input:
---
name: bad
constructor: evil
model: sonnet
tools: Read
---
Body.
note: SEC-DR-4: constructor at top level is rejected.

name: reject_pollution_key_prototype_toplevel
input:
---
name: bad
prototype: evil
model: sonnet
tools: Read
---
Body.
note: SEC-DR-4: prototype at top level is rejected.

name: reject_pollution_key_proto_nested
input:
---
name: bad
model: sonnet
tools: Read
extras:
  __proto__: injected
---
Body.
note: SEC-DR-4: __proto__ nested inside a block-style frontmatter object is rejected (recursive guard). Both Go and JS parsers handle block-style nesting and must reject identically.

name: reject_pollution_key_constructor_nested
input:
---
name: bad
model: sonnet
tools: Read
extras:
  constructor: evil
---
Body.
note: SEC-DR-4: constructor nested inside a block-style frontmatter object is rejected (recursive guard). Both Go and JS parsers handle block-style nesting and must reject identically.

name: reject_pollution_key_prototype_nested
input:
---
name: bad
model: sonnet
tools: Read
extras:
  prototype: evil
---
Body.
note: SEC-DR-4: prototype nested inside a block-style frontmatter object is rejected (recursive guard). Both Go and JS parsers handle block-style nesting and must reject identically.

name: tiered_opus_bakes_anthropic_opus
input:
---
name: architect
description: Software architect
model: opus
tools: Read, Edit, Bash
---
Body text here.
expectedOutput:
---
name: architect
description: Software architect
model: anthropic/claude-opus-4-6
permission: {read: allow, edit: allow, bash: allow}
mode: subagent
th-origin: opencode
---
Body text here.
note: #424 AC-9/AC-4: opt-in tiering bakes the pinned concrete id for the agent's CC source tier (opus -> default -> anthropic/claude-opus-4-6) instead of dropping model:.

name: tiered_sonnet_bakes_anthropic_sonnet
input:
---
description: Implementer
model: sonnet
tools: Read, Edit, Write, Bash, Glob
---
expectedOutput:
---
description: Implementer
model: anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6
permission: {read: allow, edit: allow, bash: allow, glob: allow}
mode: subagent
th-origin: opencode
---
note: #424 AC-9: sonnet -> medium -> anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6.

name: tiered_haiku_bakes_anthropic_haiku
input:
---
name: init
model: haiku
tools: 
---
Body.
expectedOutput:
---
name: init
model: anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5
permission: {}
mode: subagent
th-origin: opencode
---
Body.
note: #424 AC-9: haiku -> low -> anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5.

name: tiered_already_concrete_model_falls_back_to_model_less
input:
---
name: architect
model: anthropic/claude-opus-4-8
tools: Read
---
Body.
expectedOutput:
---
name: architect
permission: {read: allow}
mode: subagent
th-origin: opencode
---
Body.
note: #424: an already-concrete (non-alias) source model: has no entry in ccModelAliasToTier, so the tiered transform falls back to the model-less baseline rather than guessing a tier.

name: tiered_command_surface_untouched
input:
---
name: my-command
description: A command
model: sonnet
allowed-tools: Read Edit Bash
---
Body.
expectedOutput:
---
name: my-command
description: A command
permission: {allow: [Read, Edit, Bash], ask: [], deny: []}
th-origin: opencode
---
Body.
note: #424: tiering only applies to the agent surface — opencode commands carry no model: field, so a tierProvider selection is a no-op for commands.
